LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE SEP-07-2022 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NICHOLAS IRIAS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Continued To Jan-04-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NICHOLAS IRIAS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed demurrer is sustained with leave to amend.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NICHOLAS IRIAS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed motion to strike is granted with leave to amend.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
